name: Mike Mikus
subject: The phone call I want to get
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,

I know exactly what I want to be doing one year from today: Getting a phone call telling me that the votes are counted and Pennsylvanians are sending Katie McGinty to fight for us in Washington.

**[If you're ready to send Katie to the U.S. Senate, contribute $5 or more to this campaign right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/6864192921168510976/1187282342486474752?refcode=e20151108nd&amount=5)**

Katie's campaign is going to be a grassroots one like our state has never seen before. Going up against Pat Toomey and his billionaire and special interest backers is going to be a challenge. But change isn't made by shying away from challenges and hard work -- and Katie is counting on all of us to help see her through to the end.

We've got a lot of ground to cover in the next 365 days. We need to print yard signs, knock on doors, make phone calls, and fight back against the mistruths and attacks we know are coming from Koch-backed special interests.

**[If you're ready to take on those special interests and defeat Republican Pat Toomey next November, then stand with us right now as we redouble our efforts: Chip in $5 or whatever you can before midnight tonight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/6864192921168510976/1187282342486474752?refcode=e20151108nd&amount=5)**

365 days from today, I want to get that winning call. Together, we can make that happen.

Thanks for standing with Katie,

Mike
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6864192921168510976/1187282342486474752?refcode=e20151108nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6864192921168510976/1115224748448546816).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: It's all happening in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **" The War for the Senate Will Be Decided in Florida" \- _Bloomberg Business_** Friends,

I woke up a few days ago and saw a headline on Bloomberg.com that said precisely what we've known to be true for a while now. The Senate is up for grabs, and my race will determine if the Democrats can win enough seats to reclaim the majority.

This is bigger than just our campaign.

[**Let 's win Florida and win the Senate for the Democrats. Can you help us do it? If you give $5 or more by midnight, we'll hit our fundraising goal. We only have $2,500 to go.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae213c/738133e4/3a0d1afb/7f835462/2875836719/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151108?refcode=pme151108_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

We're a year out from the 2016 election, but all eyes are already on Florida. If we want to wake up next year to headlines that read "Democrats Take Back the Senate," we have to band together and lay the groundwork for a victory right now.

Like so many parents, my dad believed in teaching me the value of hard work. I spent a lot of my teen years working at construction sites, digging holes and pouring concrete. It taught me the value of hard work, as well as the importance of building a strong foundation.

That's what we're doing now. With a year to go, we're still building this foundation. And it has to be unyielding. **Instead of laying the groundwork for a house, we 're laying the groundwork to win.**

[**This fight is on. I 'll work relentlessly, but I need your help. Give what you can and set the pace for a year that ends with a victory for both Democrats and America.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae213c/738133e4/3a0d1afb/7f835462/2875836719/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151108?refcode=pme151108_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Let's turn Florida and the Senate blue,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae213c/738133e4/3a0d1afb/7f835463/2875836719/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Jeb Bush
subject: quick question, Friend
body:
Friend -

This week marks the fourth GOP presidential debate, and I think it's about time we have a debate that is actually focused on the issues facing our country.

[**Don 't you agree, Friend? If so, vote now on the top issue the debate moderators should focus on Tuesday night.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hhbrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdqhnqh_ufpnnmcy.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

The American people are tuning in to these debates to hear discussion about the issues that matter.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/inhkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrhnghz_ufpnnmcy.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**If you agree that it 's time for a substantive debate, I'm asking you to please take our quick one-question survey right now: [Jeb2016.com/Debate-Survey/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ezrljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcszdsq_ufpnnmcy.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

We've always been the Party of ideas and solutions, and there's no reason our debates shouldn't reflect that.

Thank you,

Jeb

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5329&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

The American people are tuning in to these debates to hear discussion about the issues that matter. If you agree that it 's time for a substantive debate, I'm asking you to please take our quick one-question survey right now: We've always been the Party of ideas and solutions, and there's no reason our debates shouldn't reflect that. Thank you, Jeb Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc. Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Choices
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,

One year from now, voters will make a choice. Voters will go to the polls and choose between growing the middle class and keeping struggling families down. Between growing our economy and maintaining the status quo that is leaving people behind. Between protecting citizens' rights or protecting wealthy special interests.

**[On this day, one year out from Election Day, can you help my campaign ensure that voters make the right choice next November? Chip in $5 here to help us get our message out about what's really at stake in this election.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2530886754219589632/4141925173018230784?refcode=e20151108nd.2&amount=5)**

Choices aren't always easy. In fact, they seldom are. My choice to run for the U.S. Senate wasn't an easy one, but I knew that it was the right thing to do. Too many families are struggling to get by instead of working to get ahead. Too many families are scraping together a living instead of investing in a life. Too many families - American families - aren't able to live or even pursue the American dream.

Friend, that's not right. We're one year out from Election Day, and now's when we need to build up our resources and ensure that voters really know what's at stake next November, so that they make the right choice when they go to the polls.

**[Can you help? Contribute $5 to my campaign today to help us get our message out and win.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2530886754219589632/4141925173018230784?refcode=e20151108nd.2&amount=5)**

I'm counting on you.

Thanks,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2530886754219589632/4141925173018230784?refcode=e20151108nd.2&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2530886754219589632/4069867578980302848).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Will we add you to the Donor Wall?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Your name on the donor wall! | Friend --

We're getting ready to update our Donor Wall at headquarters, and I'd like you to be a part of that -- **[will you chip in $1 before midnight to get your name on the wall?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The other side has been throwing out ideas about how to make life easier for corporations and billionaires. Frankly, I'm more concerned with what we can do to make life a little bit easier for the people you love.

That's what our Donor Wall is about -- having a place we can point to and say, "that's our team."

**I hope you'll chip in $1 before midnight to add your name to the wall right now:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjM5NDA0ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNzY4MzEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
